title: 2026 Grammy Awards: Record of the Year Winners
text: Kendrick Lamar claimed Record of the Year at the 68th Grammy Awards ceremony held on February 1, 2026, for his collaboration "luther" featuring SZA. This achievement marked a significant milestone for the rapper. The award recognizes outstanding recorded performances across all genres. The complete nominees were: "luther" – Kendrick Lamar With SZA (WINNER), "DtMF" – Bad Bunny, "Manchild" – Sabrina Carpenter, "Anxiety" – Doechii, "WILDFLOWER" – Billie Eilish, "Abracadabra" – Lady Gaga, "The Subway" – Chappell Roan, "APT." – ROSÉ, Bruno Mars. The recording earned its victory during a ceremony that celebrated Bad Bunny's historic win for Album of the Year with DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS, marking "the first Spanish-language album" to achieve this honor. Lamar's win contributed to his record-breaking night, as he surpassed Jay-Z's career Grammy count for rappers. The primetime telecast, hosted by Trevor Noah for his sixth consecutive year, aired on CBS and Paramount+ Premium from Los Angeles's Crypto.com Arena.
